subtitle: Week starts with Marie's handover; James returns 18 June
context: You're managing multiple system handovers this week. Marie Cooksey is on annual leave 8-13 June, and James Salas Guillen is out until 18 June. Key technical issues with HRIS Dashboard workflows and several action items from last week need attention.

urgent.sub: New URL goes live with old page coming down 23-24 June. Laura confirmed URL and needs final sign-off to update PXD links.

urgent.title: HRIS Dashboard workflow failures - unresolved
